author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Fluffy Across the Blue — What Kind of Pigeon Are You?
"So... someone who flakes!"
"Hello there, the name's Sundove."
"Sundove absolutely will not flake, not this time!"

#HonkaiStarRail
#StarRail
